attacking_style: Excels in long-range breakaways on mountainous stages, capable of surviving multiple categorized climbs and finishing with a sprint when the break stays away.
team_tactics: Limited data, but demonstrated ability to operate independently in breakaways without visible team support in final kilometers.
terrain_preference: Multi-climb mountain stages where breakaways can succeed; possesses both climbing endurance to survive repeated ascents and sprint speed to contest reduced bunch finishes.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify specific weaknesses; late peloton surges (final 200m) nearly caught him, suggesting possible concern against organized GC team chases.
key_patterns: Capable of winning from long breakaways on Grand Tour mountain stages (1 observation)
Holds sprint speed after sustained climbing efforts to contest reduced finishes (1 observation)
Defensive riding against late attacks, winning by positioning rather than counter-attacking (1 observation)
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows stage-winning capability but insufficient temporal data for trajectory assessment
